solution: For small T, z=e^(sT) вүҲ 1+sT, so z^(вҲ’1) вүҲ 1вҲ’sT and 1вҲ’z^(вҲ’1) вүҲ sT. Then Tz^(вҲ’1)/(1вҲ’z^(вҲ’1))ВІ вүҲ T1/(sT)ВІ = 1/sВІ. Similarly 1/(1вҲ’z^(вҲ’1)) вүҲ 1/(sT) which corresponds to 1/s in the bilinear sense.
